final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg X
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            X <= 0;
        end else begin
            X <= A & B;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      X <= ~A & ~B;
    end
  end

endmodule
